title: Russian-studies bibliography + reflexive meta-analysis session
public_claim: Russian-studies bibliography + reflexive meta-analysis session is a source packet for this is a session-continuity handoff: its job is to make a single chat session portable so a future pass, future session, or future analytical layer can pick up without loss.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
